entity.summary: Centralized digital-asset exchange providing spot trading, account-based market access, trading APIs, and web trading interfaces across crypto markets.
entity.notes: Current first-party Dex-Trade website, trading route, and API documentation remain reachable. CoinGecko and CoinPaprika candidate sources independently preserve Dex-Trade as an exchange venue. Confidence is medium because this review pass did not reconstruct jurisdictional or corporate-registration history.

evidence.title: Dex-Trade official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website remains reachable and serves the active account and trading application shell.

evidence.title: Dex-Trade API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation endpoint remains reachable and supports the exchange identity and programmatic trading surface.

evidence.title: Dex-Trade exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies Dex-Trade under the dex-trade.com domain; HEI consolidates duplicate Dex-Trade source representations into one entity.
